title: tetragonia robusta
intro: Tetragonia robusta, also known as New Zealand spinach or kōkihi, is a succulent plant native to New Zealand and Australia. It is a type of green leafy vegetable that can be used as a substitute for spinach. The medicinal properties of Tetragonia robusta include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The health benefits of consuming this plant include its high nutritional value, with rich sources of vitamins A and C, iron, and calcium, making it an excellent herbal preparation for salads, soups, and sautéed dishes.
